description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with a mix of flat-roofed and partially covered outdoor spaces. The structure is surrounded by landscaped lawns, mature trees, and a large rectangular swimming pool, with several lounge chairs and outdoor seating areas. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored stone, brick, and glass, with large windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The property includes multiple bedrooms, a shaded patio, and a small garden area with flowering shrubs. The main entrance is accentuated by a minimalist facade and a blend of geometric forms. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between interior rooms and exterior recreational spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a spacious pool area. The design blends stone, brick, and glass for a contemporary indoor-outdoor living experience.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a landscaped garden with flowering shrubs and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expansive pool, lounge chairs, and open patio areas with greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, sun loungers, and a mix of brick and glass facades with large sliding doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garden, shaded patio, and additional bedroom spaces with visible windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
